introSection: Hurricane is a steel roller coaster built by American manufacturer E&F Miler Industries located at Fun Spot America Atlanta in Fayetteville, Georgia, USA. It originally operated at Wild Island from 2002 to 2006.

sections.title: History
sections.content: While at Wild Island, the ride was known as Wildcat. It was relocated to Fun Spot America Atlanta (then Dixieland Fun Park) where it reopened in May 2007. After being relocated, it was renamed Screaming Eagle from 2007 through 2021.

fullText:
Hurricane is a steel roller coaster built by American manufacturer E&F Miler Industries located at Fun Spot America Atlanta in Fayetteville, Georgia, USA. It originally operated at Wild Island from 2002 to 2006.

While at Wild Island, the ride was known as Wildcat. It was relocated to Fun Spot America Atlanta (then Dixieland Fun Park) where it reopened in May 2007. After being relocated, it was renamed Screaming Eagle from 2007 through 2021.

Blue track, unpainted supports.
